title: Hermes Flight Controller
summary: A highly capable STM32H743 based no compromises flight controller

specs.label: I/O
specs.value: 4x UART, 1x SPI, CAM/VTX, 2x i2c + Qwiic, CAN

sections.heading: The Board
body: Hermes is a flight controller designed in KiCad and AutoDesk Fusion360. It consists of a 4 layer PCB centred around the STM32H743 MCU. It is designed as a no-compromises flight controller, being as powerful as possible whilst still being easy to tinker with.
